summary: Dealer Finance Features Testing Complete (Iteration 82). All dealer invoice/payment routes working correctly. /dealer/invoices opens real page (not redirect). Tab structure (Faturalarım/Hesap Hareketlerim), filters, PDF download, invoice detail with payments all functional. Routes /dealer/company, /dealer/privacy, quick links in settings verified. Yardım Merkezi button navigates to /bilgi/yardim-merkezi. Backend APIs tested: dealer invoices sorted DESC, payments with normalized_message, PDF download returns 200 application/pdf, ownership enforcement returns 403 for foreign invoices. Admin/Account finance regression all pass.

issues: React hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody>/<option>/<select> - cosmetic only, functionality works

seed_data_creation: None - existing dealer invoices/payments used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dealer finance features fully tested. 15 dealer invoices exist with various statuses (issued, paid, failed). 10 dealer payments exist with normalized_message. One invoice has PDF available (INV-20260302-B5E2F6). PDF download ownership check returns 403 for non-owner. All /dealer/* routes working: /dealer/invoices, /dealer/company, /dealer/privacy, /dealer/settings with quick links.
